languages.text: "Буду краткой". {n}Лария говорит сухо, будто зачитывает доклад:{/n} "Противник кратно превосходит нас числом. Надежнее всего организовать линию обороны прямо здесь, во внутреннем дворце. Верные люди и воинская доблесть — единственное, на что можно положиться сейчас, Ваша Светлость".
languages.translation_comment:
Спикер: Лария
не играет DL_LariaOnJuvennaSide
выдаем Obj2_Cl_Assault, Obj1_Counterattack и Obj2_Cl_Laria

traits.locale_text: "Буду краткой". {n}Лария говорит сухо, спокойно и отрывисто.{/n} "Противник кратно превосходит нас числом. Надежнее всего организовать линию обороны прямо здесь, во внутреннем дворце. Верные люди и воинская доблесть — единственное, на что можно положиться сейчас, Ваша Светлость".
traits.speaker: LariaVoigtvir

languages.translation_comment:
Спикер: Лария
не играет DL_LariaOnJuvennaSide
выдаем Obj2_Cl_Assault, Obj1_Counterattack и Obj2_Cl_Laria

languages.text: "I will be brief." {n}Laria speaks matter-of-factly, as if reading from a report:{/n} "The enemy vastly outnumbers us. The best place to stage a line of defence is right here in the inner palace. Loyal people and military prowess are the only things we can rely on now, Your Lordship."
languages.original_text: "Буду краткой". {n}Лария говорит сухо, будто зачитывает доклад:{/n} "Противник кратно превосходит нас числом. Надежнее всего организовать линию обороны прямо здесь, во внутреннем дворце. Верные люди и воинская доблесть — единственное, на что можно положиться сейчас, Ваша Светлость".

traits.locale_text: "I will be brief." {n}Laria speaks matter-of-factly, as if reading from a report:{/n} "The enemy vastly outnumbers us. The best place to stage a line of defence is right here in the inner palace. Loyal people and military prowess are the only things we can rely on now, Your Lordship."

"I will be brief." {n}Laria speaks matter-of-factly, as if reading from a report:{/n} "The enemy vastly outnumbers us. The best place to stage a line of defence is right here in the inner palace. Loyal people and military prowess are the only things we can rely on now, Your Lordship."

"I will be brief." {n}Laria speaks matter-of-factly, as if reading from a report:{/n} "The enemy vastly outnumbers us. The best place to stage a line of defence is right here in the inner palace. Loyal people and military prowess are the only things we can rely on now, Your Lordship."

languages.text: “我会简要说明。”{n}菈丽雅语气平静，如同在宣读报告：{/n}“敌军数量远超我们。最佳防御位置就在内殿。大人，如今我们唯一能依靠的，只有忠诚的民众和军事力量了。”
languages.original_text: "I will be brief." {n}Laria speaks matter-of-factly, as if reading from a report:{/n} "The enemy vastly outnumbers us. The best place to stage a line of defence is right here in the inner palace. Loyal people and military prowess are the only things we can rely on now, Your Lordship."

traits.locale_text: “我会简要说明。”{n}菈丽雅语气平静，如同在宣读报告：{/n}“敌军数量远超我们。最佳防御位置就在内殿。大人，如今我们唯一能依靠的，只有忠诚的民众和军事力量了。”

languages.text: « Je serai brève. » {n}Laria s'exprime de façon posée, comme si elle lisait un rapport :{/n} « L'ennemi est bien plus nombreux. Le meilleur emplacement pour une ligne de défense, c'est ici, en plein cœur du palais. Nous ne pourrons donc compter que sur la fidélité des gens et leurs prouesses au combat, Votre Seigneurie. »
languages.original_text: "I will be brief." {n}Laria speaks matter-of-factly, as if reading from a report:{/n} "The enemy vastly outnumbers us. The best place to stage a line of defence is right here in the inner palace. Loyal people and military prowess are the only things we can rely on now, Your Lordship."

traits.locale_text: « Je serai brève. » {n}Laria s'exprime de façon posée, comme si elle lisait un rapport :{/n} « L'ennemi est bien plus nombreux. Le meilleur emplacement pour une ligne de défense, c'est ici, en plein cœur du palais. Nous ne pourrons donc compter que sur la fidélité des gens et leurs prouesses au combat, Votre Seigneurie. »

languages.text: «Seré breve». {n}Laria habla sin emociones, como si leyera un informe:{/n} «El enemigo nos supera en número. El mejor lugar en el que montar una línea defensiva es aquí, en el palacio interior. Solo podemos depender de nuestros fieles y de la competencia militar, milord».
languages.original_text: "I will be brief." {n}Laria speaks matter-of-factly, as if reading from a report:{/n} "The enemy vastly outnumbers us. The best place to stage a line of defence is right here in the inner palace. Loyal people and military prowess are the only things we can rely on now, Your Lordship."

traits.locale_text: «Seré breve». {n}Laria habla sin emociones, como si leyera un informe:{/n} «El enemigo nos supera en número. El mejor lugar en el que montar una línea defensiva es aquí, en el palacio interior. Solo podemos depender de nuestros fieles y de la competencia militar, milord».

languages.text: "Kısa tutacağım." {n}Laria, sanki bir rapordan okuyormuş gibi tarafsız bir şekilde konuşuyor.{/n} "Düşman sayıca bizden çok üstün. Savunma hattı kurmak için en iyi yer burası, yani iç saray. Şu anda bir tek bize sadık kimselere ve askerî hünerimize güvenebiliriz Lord Hazretleri."
languages.original_text: "I will be brief." {n}Laria speaks matter-of-factly, as if reading from a report:{/n} "The enemy vastly outnumbers us. The best place to stage a line of defence is right here in the inner palace. Loyal people and military prowess are the only things we can rely on now, Your Lordship."

traits.locale_text: "Kısa tutacağım." {n}Laria, sanki bir rapordan okuyormuş gibi tarafsız bir şekilde konuşuyor.{/n} "Düşman sayıca bizden çok üstün. Savunma hattı kurmak için en iyi yer burası, yani iç saray. Şu anda bir tek bize sadık kimselere ve askerî hünerimize güvenebiliriz Lord Hazretleri."

languages.text: "Ich werde mich kurz fassen." {n}Larias Stimme ist neutral, als würde sie einen Bericht vorlesen:{/n} "Der Feind ist uns zahlenmäßig deutlich überlegen. Der beste Ort für eine Verteidigungslinie ist hier im inneren Palast. Wir können uns allein auf die Loyalität unserer Leute und militärisches Geschick verlassen, Eure Lordschaft."
languages.original_text: "I will be brief." {n}Laria speaks matter-of-factly, as if reading from a report:{/n} "The enemy vastly outnumbers us. The best place to stage a line of defence is right here in the inner palace. Loyal people and military prowess are the only things we can rely on now, Your Lordship."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde mich kurz fassen." {n}Larias Stimme ist neutral, als würde sie einen Bericht vorlesen:{/n} "Der Feind ist uns zahlenmäßig deutlich überlegen. Der beste Ort für eine Verteidigungslinie ist hier im inneren Palast. Wir können uns allein auf die Loyalität unserer Leute und militärisches Geschick verlassen, Eure Lordschaft."

languages.text: 「簡潔に述べます」{n}、リアリアは報告書を読み上げるように淡々と語る。{/n}「敵は我々をはるかに上回る数勢力である。防衛の陣地を構える最良の場所は、ここ、内宮である。忠義と武勇のみを頼りにするしかない、殿」
languages.original_text: "I will be brief." {n}Laria speaks matter-of-factly, as if reading from a report:{/n} "The enemy vastly outnumbers us. The best place to stage a line of defence is right here in the inner palace. Loyal people and military prowess are the only things we can rely on now, Your Lordship."
